entries.topic: Promising underexplored directions for long-duration grid batteries
entries.coordinatorPrompt: Establish initial framing and promising directions.
entries.response:
Position:
Many long-duration claims ignore BOS and maintenance costs.

Supporting Reasoning:
Total installed cost often dominates chemistry-level gains.

Confidence Level:
High

Claim Classification (Established | Inferred | Speculative):
Established

Main Uncertainty:
Real-world service costs by climate region.

Critique of Others:
Novel chemistry proposals understate degradation pathways.

Revised View:
Require side-by-side techno-economic assumptions.
